title: boswellia carteri
intro: Boswellia carteri, also known as frankincense, is a type of tree resin obtained from the Boswellia carteri tree, a small tree native to Africa and the Middle East. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Boswellia carteri include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Boswellia carteri include essential oils, capsules, and teas, which have been used to promote overall health and well-being.
